naming.id: Stable snake_case machine identifier. Never change after publication.
naming.slug: Lowercase kebab-case URL and filename identifier.
naming.entityType: guide, item, weapon, ammo, magazine, attachment, vehicle, recipe, disease, map-location, or loot-category.

rules: Relationships store stable IDs, not duplicated display data.
Index files contain card/search metadata only.
Image paths are relative to the page loading the data.
Patch-sensitive records include game version and verification status.
A missing image must fall back to a shared placeholder.
